email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Growth Marketer bij Base360. Uw visie om het AI-besturingssysteem voor B2C-merken te bouwen sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring in SEO, GEO en contentmarketing.

Bij Episto optimaliseer ik on-page SEO, schrijf ik keyword-gerichte content en beheer ik WordPress-sites. Op mirook.com pas ik gestructureerde data en GEO toe om zichtbaarheid in AI-zoekmachines te verbeteren. Ik ben gewend om snel te experimenteren, data te analyseren en resultaten te meten met tools zoals Google Analytics, SEMrush en Ahrefs.

Ik ben leergierig, zelfstandig en gedreven om te groeien in growth marketing. Mijn technische achtergrond en affiniteit met AI stellen mij in staat om snel waarde toe te voegen. Ik spreek Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (met lessen).

Ik hoop mijn motivatie en vaardigheden in een gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear team,

I am very excited to apply for the Growth Marketer role at Base360. Your vision of building the AI operating system for B2C brands strongly resonates with my experience in SEO, GEO, and content marketing.

At Episto, I handle on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted content, and manage WordPress sites. On mirook.com, I apply structured data and GEO to improve visibility in AI-powered search engines. I am used to experimenting quickly, analyzing data, and measuring results with tools like Google Analytics, SEMrush, and Ahrefs.

I am eager to learn, self-directed, and driven to grow in growth marketing. My technical background and affinity with AI allow me to add value quickly. I speak English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (with lessons).

I would love to discuss my motivation and skills further in an interview.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste heer/mevrouw,

Toen ik de vacature voor Growth Marketer bij Base360 las, voelde ik direct een klik. Uw missie om het AI-besturingssysteem voor B2C-merken te bouwen is precies waar ik mijn energie in wil steken. Mijn ervaring in SEO, GEO en contentmarketing, gecombineerd met een technische basis en een leergierige instelling, maken mij een sterke kandidaat voor deze hands-on rol.

Bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor on-page SEO, van keyword research tot publicatie, en schrijf ik content die organisch verkeer aantrekt. Ik bouw en onderhoud WordPress-sites met Elementor en Astra, en gebruik SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics en Search Console om prestaties te monitoren. Dit sluit aan bij uw behoefte aan iemand die kan experimenteren, data kan duiden en kan optimaliseren.

Mijn eigen project mirook.com laat zien hoe ik gestructureerde data (JSON-LD), entity-optimalisatie en GEO toepas om zichtbaarheid in zowel traditionele als AI-zoekmachines te verbeteren. Ik heb er llms.txt geïmplementeerd en technische audits uitgevoerd om de search-health score te verhogen. Dit past bij uw focus op AI en moderne groeikanalen.

Ik ben gewend om zelfstandig doelen te stellen en de weg ernaartoe te vinden. Of het nu gaat om betaalde advertenties, SEO, outbound of content – ik duik erin en leer snel. Mijn analytische kant helpt me om te focussen op wat werkt. Ik spreek Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (met wekelijkse lessen).

Ik wil graag deel uitmaken van een vroeg stadium bedrijf waar ik kan bouwen, experimenteren en groeien. Ik hoop mijn motivatie in een gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear hiring team,

When I read the Growth Marketer vacancy at Base360, I felt an immediate connection. Your mission to build the AI operating system for B2C brands is exactly where I want to invest my energy. My experience in SEO, GEO, and content marketing, combined with a technical foundation and a keen willingness to learn, make me a strong candidate for this hands-on role.

At Episto, I am responsible for on-page SEO, from keyword research to publication, and write content that drives organic traffic. I build and maintain WordPress sites with Elementor and Astra, and use SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, and Search Console to monitor performance. This aligns with your need for someone who can experiment, interpret data, and optimize.

My own project mirook.com demonstrates how I apply structured data (JSON-LD), entity optimization, and GEO to improve visibility in both traditional and AI-powered search engines. I implemented llms.txt and conducted technical audits to raise the search-health score. This fits your focus on AI and modern growth channels.

I am used to setting goals independently and figuring out the path to achieve them. Whether it's paid ads, SEO, outbound, or content – I dive in and learn fast. My analytical side helps me focus on what works. I speak English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (with weekly lessons).

I want to be part of an early-stage company where I can build, experiment, and grow. I hope to discuss my motivation further in an interview.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
Hands-on SEO & GEO experience: on-page SEO, keyword research, structured data, and AI search optimization (GEO/AEO) – directly applicable to growth channels.
Built and optimized a full WordPress site (mirook.com) with conversion-focused design, structured data, and technical audits – shows ability to build funnels and landing pages.
Data-driven: uses Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs to track performance and guide decisions – comfortable with analytics and attribution.
Self-directed and scrappy: independently manages client projects at Episto and personal project – takes goals and figures out the how.
Fast learner with technical foundation: front-end development experience (AngularJS, JavaScript) and quick to adopt AI tools – fits the AI-savvy requirement.
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
